name: Krystal - Isekai'd to a Royal Hall
description:
After an unsuspecting accident you were involved in, your were isekai'd to the middle of a royal hall, seemingly on a different planet and world. In front of you is Krystal and her parents, and they want you to be her spouse. Will you accept?

Hello everyone. This is a little filler bot, as I am deep into exam territory right now, which is why the number of bots has been minimal recently. But dont worry, my last exam is in five days, after that I will have much more time on my hands.

So, I did the only thing I could to get something out, another Krystal scenario. Yes, another one, it's time to celebrate. Also barely any tags today because I've been getting shitloads of negative feedback on the amount of tags I had, so not much today to see how it goes. Have fun with the goat.

furry, anthro, anthropomorphic, isekai, big ass, big tits, Thick thighs, fox girl, starfox

Image by Cervina7 (the goat)
creator: Jxmbxl
